SB-002.evidence: data-collapsible='icon' when collapsed, 'expanded' when expanded. 6 elements with group-data-[collapsible] Tailwind selectors confirmed working

SB-003.description: Tooltips on every nav item when collapsed
SB-003.evidence: Tooltips confirmed for Dashboard, Alerts, Settings via DOM tooltip role queries. All nav items have tooltip wrappers.

SB-005.description: Clusters section → inline accordion with ChevronDown
SB-005.evidence: Accordion opens/closes on click. ChevronDown rotates to ChevronUp when open. Sub-nav items visible inline.

SB-006.description: Sidebar width: CSS transition instead of Motion spring
SB-006.evidence: class includes 'transition-[width] duration-200 ease-out' confirmed via DOM inspection. Width changes w-14 (56px) ↔ w-56 (224px)

SB-008.evidence: Source code: w-[2px] confirmed in Sidebar.tsx line 191. Previously was 3px per SB-008 changelog.

SB-009.evidence: Keyboard event listener confirmed via DOM. KeyboardEvent('keydown', {key:'b', ctrlKey:true}) dispatched → sidebar width changed instantly from w-14 to w-56.

SB-010.description: Clusters parent nav active when on /clusters/* route
SB-010.evidence: On /clusters/{id}, aria snapshot shows 'link Clusters [expanded]'. Visual active state confirmed in screenshot.

SB-011.description: Inline cluster sub-nav under accordion with env color dots
SB-011.evidence: prod-cluster-eks (orange dot) and test-cluster-minikube (teal/blue dot) visible in expanded accordion. Visible in dark and light mode.
